*Generated by Claude*

# Viecz — User Flows

## Route Map

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph Public
        LANDING["/landing"]
        REPORT["/report"]
        TASK_DETAIL["/tasks/:id"]
    end

    subgraph "Guest Only (guestGuard)"
        LOGIN["/login"]
        PHONE["/phone"]
        REGISTER["/register"]
    end

    subgraph "Auth Required (authGuard)"
        MARKETPLACE["/marketplace"]
        NEW_TASK["/tasks/new"]
        EDIT_TASK["/tasks/:id/edit"]
        APPLY["/tasks/:id/apply"]
        WALLET["/wallet"]
        CHECKOUT["/payment/checkout"]
        PAY_RETURN["/payment/return"]
        MESSAGES["/messages"]
        CHAT["/messages/:id"]
        MY_JOBS["/my-jobs/:mode"]
        NOTIFS["/notifications"]
        PROFILE["/profile/:id"]
    end

    ROOT["/ (root)"] -->|guest| LANDING
    ROOT -->|authenticated| MARKETPLACE
    REGISTER -->|redirect| LOGIN
```

## Auth Flow — Email OTP (Primary)

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[User visits /login] --> B{Has token?}
    B -->|Yes| C[Redirect → /marketplace]
    B -->|No| D[Show email input]

    D --> E[Enter email + click Continue]
    E --> F["POST /api/v1/auth/otp/request"]
    F --> G{Response?}

    G -->|400 invalid email| H[Show red error box]
    H --> D
    G -->|429 rate limited| I[Show 'wait 1 min' error]
    I --> D
    G -->|200 OK| J{is_new_user?}

    J -->|true| K[Show: Code input + Name field]
    J -->|false| L[Show: Code input only]

    K --> M[Enter name + OTP code]
    L --> N[Enter OTP code]

    M --> O[Click Sign In]
    N --> O

    O --> P["POST /api/v1/auth/otp/verify"]
    P --> Q{Response?}

    Q -->|401 invalid code| R[Show error, stay on step 2]
    R --> K
    Q -->|200 OK| S[Store tokens in localStorage]
    S --> T[Redirect → /marketplace]

    K -.->|Resend code| F
    L -.->|Resend code| F
```

## Auth Flow — Phone Login (Supplementary)

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[User visits /phone] --> B{Has token?}
    B -->|Yes| C[Redirect → /marketplace]
    B -->|No| D[Show phone input]

    D --> E[Enter phone number]
    E --> F[Firebase sendVerificationCode]
    F --> G[SMS sent, show code input]

    G --> H[Enter 6-digit SMS code]
    H --> I[Firebase confirmCode → idToken]
    I --> J["POST /api/v1/auth/phone"]
    J --> K{Response?}

    K -->|Error| L[Show error]
    L --> G
    K -->|200 OK| M[Store tokens]
    M --> N[Redirect → /marketplace]
```

## Core User Journey — Task Poster

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Login via email OTP] --> B[Browse /marketplace]
    B --> C[Click 'Create Task' FAB]
    C --> D["/tasks/new — Fill form"]

    D --> E["Title + Description + Category\n+ Price + Location + Deadline"]
    E --> F{Wallet balance ≥ price?}
    F -->|No| G[Deposit funds first]
    G --> H["/wallet → /payment/checkout"]
    H --> I[Scan QR, pay via bank]
    I --> J[Payment confirmed]
    J --> D
    F -->|Yes| K[Submit task]
    K --> L["/tasks/:id — Task created"]

    L --> M[Wait for applications]
    M --> N[View applications in sidebar]
    N --> O{Accept applicant?}
    O -->|Yes| P["Escrow holds task price\nfrom poster's wallet"]
    P --> Q[Task → in_progress]
    Q --> R[Chat with tasker via /messages/:id]
    R --> S[Work done?]
    S -->|Yes| T[Click 'Mark Complete']
    T --> U["Escrow released to tasker\nTask → completed"]
    O -->|No| V[Reject / wait for more]
    V --> M
```

## Core User Journey — Task Applicant

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Login] --> B[Browse /marketplace]
    B --> C[Search / filter / Near Me / Map]
    C --> D[Click task card]
    D --> E["/tasks/:id — View details"]

    E --> F{Authenticated?}
    F -->|No| G["Show signup CTA\n'Register to Apply'"]
    G --> H["/login"]
    F -->|Yes| I{Own task?}
    I -->|Yes| J[Show Edit/Delete buttons]
    I -->|No| K{Already applied?}
    K -->|Yes| L["Show 'Applied ✓' badge"]
    K -->|No| M{Task open & not overdue?}
    M -->|No| N[Apply button disabled]
    M -->|Yes| O[Click Apply]

    O --> P{Profile complete?}
    P -->|No| Q[Profile gate modal → complete profile]
    Q --> O
    P -->|Yes| R["/tasks/:id/apply"]
    R --> S["Enter proposed price + message"]
    S --> T[Submit application]
    T --> U[Redirect → /tasks/:id]

    U --> V[Wait for acceptance]
    V --> W[Notification: accepted!]
    W --> X[Chat with poster via /messages/:id]
    X --> Y[Complete work]
    Y --> Z[Poster marks complete]
    Z --> AA[Payment received in wallet]
```

## Payment Flow — Deposit

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A["/wallet"] --> B[Enter deposit amount]
    B --> C{Amount ≥ 2000 VND?}
    C -->|No| D[Validation error]
    C -->|Yes| E["POST /api/v1/wallet/deposit"]
    E --> F["Response: { url, order_code, qr_code, ... }"]
    F --> G["/payment/checkout"]

    G --> H["Show QR code + bank details\n5-minute countdown"]
    H --> I{User pays via bank app?}
    I -->|Yes| J["Poll every 2s: GET /wallet/check-payment"]
    J --> K{Payment confirmed?}
    K -->|No, still polling| J
    K -->|Yes| L["🎉 Explosion animation\n'PAID' card"]
    L --> M["5s countdown → redirect to /wallet"]

    I -->|Timer expires| N["'Payment expired' message"]
    N --> O[Return to /wallet]

    I -->|Cancel| P["PayOS redirects to /payment/return?cancel=true"]
    P --> Q["'Payment cancelled' message"]
    Q --> O
```

## Payment Flow — Withdrawal

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A["/wallet"] --> B{Has bank account?}
    B -->|No| C["Add bank account\n(select bank, enter account #, holder name)"]
    C --> B
    B -->|Yes| D[Select bank account]
    D --> E[Enter withdrawal amount]
    E --> F{Amount ≤ available balance\nand ≥ 10,000 VND?}
    F -->|No| G[Validation error]
    F -->|Yes| H["POST /api/v1/wallet/withdraw"]
    H --> I[Withdrawal pending]
    I --> J[Notification when processed]
```

## Messaging Flow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Application accepted] --> B[Conversation auto-created]
    B --> C["/messages — conversation list"]
    C --> D["Click conversation\n(shows task # + title)"]
    D --> E["/messages/:conversationId"]

    E --> F[WebSocket connects]
    F --> G[Load message history]
    G --> H{Task still active?}

    H -->|Yes| I[Type message + send]
    I --> J[Message sent via WebSocket]
    J --> K[Other party sees message in real-time]
    K --> L[Typing indicator shown while typing]
    L --> I

    H -->|No — completed/cancelled| M["Chat closed badge\nInput disabled"]
```

## Navigation Structure

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    subgraph "Desktop Nav (floating pill)"
        LOGO[Logo] --- MKT[Marketplace]
        MKT --- WAL[Wallet]
        WAL --- MSG[Messages]
        MSG --- LANG["🇬🇧/🇻🇳"]
        LANG --- BELL["🔔 Notifications"]
        BELL --- USER["👤 Menu"]
    end

    subgraph "Mobile Bottom Bar"
        M_MKT[Marketplace] --- M_WAL[Wallet]
        M_WAL --- M_CREATE["+ Create"]
        M_CREATE --- M_MSG[Messages]
        M_MSG --- M_PROF[Profile]
    end

    USER --> PROFILE["/profile/:id"]
    USER --> LOGOUT["Logout → /login"]
    BELL --> NOTIFS["/notifications"]
    M_CREATE --> NEW_TASK["/tasks/new"]
```

## Wallet Balance Model

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    subgraph Wallet
        TOTAL["Total Balance"]
        AVAIL["Available Balance"]
        ESCROW["Escrow Balance"]
    end

    DEPOSIT["Deposit"] -->|+| AVAIL
    ACCEPT_APP["Accept application"] -->|freeze| ESCROW
    AVAIL -->|-| ESCROW
    TASK_COMPLETE["Task completed"] -->|release to tasker| ESCROW
    AVAIL -->|withdraw| WITHDRAWAL["Bank withdrawal"]
```

## Conditional UI Logic

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    VISIT[Visit /tasks/:id] --> AUTH{Authenticated?}
    AUTH -->|No| GUEST_CTA["Show signup CTA\n+ benefits list"]
    AUTH -->|Yes| ROLE{Is task owner?}

    ROLE -->|Yes, owner| OWNER_VIEW
    ROLE -->|No, visitor| VISITOR_VIEW

    subgraph OWNER_VIEW[Owner View]
        OV_OPEN{Status?}
        OV_OPEN -->|open| EDIT_DEL["Edit + Delete buttons\n+ Applications sidebar"]
        OV_OPEN -->|in_progress| COMPLETE_BTN["Mark Complete button\n+ Chat link"]
        OV_OPEN -->|completed| DONE["Read-only view"]
    end

    subgraph VISITOR_VIEW[Visitor View]
        VV_CHECK{Already applied?}
        VV_CHECK -->|Yes| APPLIED["'Applied ✓' badge"]
        VV_CHECK -->|No| VV_STATUS{Task open\n& not overdue?}
        VV_STATUS -->|Yes| APPLY_BTN["Apply button"]
        VV_STATUS -->|No| DISABLED["Cannot apply"]
    end
```

## Notification Types

| Type | Icon | Trigger |
|------|------|---------|
| `task_created` | post_add | New task created |
| `application_received` | person_add | Someone applied to your task |
| `application_sent` | send | Your application was sent |
| `application_accepted` | check_circle | Your application was accepted |
| `application_rejected` | cancel | Your application was rejected |
| `task_completed` | task_alt | Task marked complete |
| `payment_received` | payments | Payment credited to wallet |
| `message` | chat | New chat message |
| `task_cancelled` | block | Task was cancelled |
